name: Toxic-MD
description: A lightning-fast WhatsApp bot with multi-device support, built on Node.js & Baileys.

SESSION.description: 🔑 Required – Your WhatsApp session ID (generated after linking the bot).

DEVICE.description: Device mode: android (default) or ios. Android uses interactive buttons; iOS uses text-only responses(for a reason). Accepted values: android, ios, default.

HEROKU_APP_NAME.description: Optional – The Heroku app name you've used (needed for updating the bot).

HEROKU_API_KEY.description: Optional – Your Heroku API key (only needed for updating the bot).
